_guide.purpose: Edit this file directly. Prompt text is English for diffusion-model compatibility.
_guide.simple_item: Every selectable item needs only id and prompt. menu_label optionally supplies a short Director label. Set disabled to true to keep an item in the database while excluding it from all composer selections. Optional fields are menu_label, disabled, weight, tags, requires, excludes, requires_tags, requires_any_tags, excludes_tags, requires_expression_tags, occupies_slots, allowed_colors and mix_tags. requires_any_tags means at least one listed tag must be present.
_guide.photoshoot: A photoshoot fixes the assembled adult model, outfit, colors and location. It progresses through undressing into a predictable explicit plateau of rear views, close-ups and masturbation shots.
_guide.random: Random mode independently assembles every image and chooses any stage from the selected outfit template.
_guide.human_compatibility: settings.default_ethnic_appearance controls automatic ethnicity. settings.human_defaults.fixed selects exact default traits, while required_tags selects a random compatible item from a tagged pool. Ethnic appearance records expose allows_*_skin and heritage_* tags. Later human categories use requires_tags or requires_any_tags because the composer accumulates tags in database order.
_guide.outfit_templates: Slots select garments by catalog and required_tags. color_group reuses a color. match_group asks pieces to share a mix tag.
_guide.body_visibility: Use breasts, nipples, pubic_area and genitals. Anatomy prompt fragments are emitted only when listed by a stage.
_guide.safety: This database contains only explicitly adult women aged 21 or 22 and contains no teen-coded descriptions.
